name: delayt-monorepo
description: Delayt — API latency testing with percentile analysis

scripts.dev:all: concurrently "npm run dev:shared" "npm run dev:backend" "npm run dev:frontend"
scripts.build:all: npm run build:shared && npm run build:cli && npm run build:backend && npm run build:frontend
scripts.build:cli: npm run build:shared && cd packages/cli && npm install --no-save file:../shared && npm run build
scripts.test:cli: npm run build:cli && node packages/cli/dist/index.js run -u https://httpbin.org/delay/0.1 -n 3 -q
scripts.pack:cli: npm run build:cli && cd packages/cli && npm pack
scripts.publish:shared: npm run build:shared && cd packages/shared && npm publish --access public
scripts.publish:cli: npm run build:cli && cd packages/cli && npm publish --access public
scripts.test:all: npm run test:backend && npm run test:frontend
scripts.typecheck: npm run typecheck:backend && npm run typecheck:frontend && npm run typecheck:cli
scripts.typecheck:cli: cd packages/cli && npm install --no-save file:../shared && npx tsc --noEmit

author: devleo10
